con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://wspub.pj.saj.softplan.com.br" xmlns:soapenc11="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://wspub.pj.saj.softplan.com.br" xmlns:soap12="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:wsdlsoap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap11="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:soapenc12="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-encoding"> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://wspub.pj.saj.softplan.com.br"> <xsd:element name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="string64" nillable="true" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="out" nillable="true" type="xsd:base64Binary"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <xsd:complexType/> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="out" nillable="true" type="xsd:int"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="enviarPublicacoes"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="bytes" nillable="true" type="xsd:base64Binary"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="enviarPublicacoesResponse"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="out" nillable="true" type="xsd:base64Binary"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="efetuarLogon"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="userId" nillable="true" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="senha" nillable="true" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="efetuarLogonResponse"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="out" nillable="true" type="xsd:base64Binary"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoesStringRequest"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:enviarPublicacoesString"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoesResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:enviarPublicacoesResponse"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="efetuarLogonRequest"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:efetuarLogon"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="finalizaEnvioDiarioRequest"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:finalizaEnvioDiario"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoesRequest"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:enviarPublicacoes"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="efetuarLogonResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:efetuarLogonResponse"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="PublicacaoWSPortType"> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <wsdl:input name="enviarPublicacoesStringRequest" message="tns:enviarPublicacoesStringRequest"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse" message="tns:enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <wsdl:input name="finalizaEnvioDiarioRequest" message="tns:finalizaEnvioDiarioRequest"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse" message="tns:finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoes"> <wsdl:input name="enviarPublicacoesRequest" message="tns:enviarPublicacoesRequest"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="enviarPublicacoesResponse" message="tns:enviarPublicacoesResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="efetuarLogon"> <wsdl:input name="efetuarLogonRequest" message="tns:efetuarLogonRequest"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="efetuarLogonResponse" message="tns:efetuarLogonResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="PublicacaoWSHttpBinding" type="tns:PublicacaoWSPortType"> <wsdlsoap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction=""/> <wsdl:input name="enviarPublicacoesStringRequest"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction=""/> <wsdl:input name="finalizaEnvioDiarioRequest"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoes"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction=""/> <wsdl:input name="enviarPublicacoesRequest"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="enviarPublicacoesResponse"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="efetuarLogon"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction=""/> <wsdl:input name="efetuarLogonRequest"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="efetuarLogonResponse"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="PublicacaoWS"> <wsdl:port name="PublicacaoWSHttpPort" binding="tns:PublicacaoWSHttpBinding"> <wsdlsoap:address location="http://creci.sajcloud.com.br/wspubWeb/services/PublicacaoWS"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
